title: Mario Kart 8 Deluxe
description: Race Nintendo characters across creative tracks.
fun_fact: The game has been on Nintendo's best-sellers list for over 7 years straight!

title: Fall Guys
description: Compete as a wobbly bean in chaotic obstacle courses.
fun_fact: The beans have no bones - they're literally just beans in costumes!

title: Among Us
description: Find the impostor among your crewmates or deceive them all.
fun_fact: The game was released in 2018 but didn't become popular until 2020!

title: Rocket League
description: Play soccer with rocket-powered cars.
fun_fact: The game was originally called 'Supersonic Acrobatic Rocket-Powered Battle-Cars'!

title: Overcooked 2
description: Cook meals in chaotic kitchens with friends.
fun_fact: The game was designed to test relationships - it's infamous for causing friendly arguments!

title: Minecraft
description: Build anything you can imagine in a blocky procedural world.
fun_fact: The game has sold over 300 million copies, making it the best-selling video game of all time!

title: Terraria
description: Dig, fight, explore, and build in a 2D sandbox world.
fun_fact: The game has received over 50 major content updates since its 2011 launch!

title: Splatoon 3
description: Ink-based multiplayer battles with style.
fun_fact: The Splatoon world exists 12,000 years after humanity went extinct from rising sea levels.

title: Fortnite
description: Battle royale with building mechanics and pop culture crossovers.
fun_fact: The game started as a zombie survival game before Battle Royale was added!

title: Super Smash Bros. Ultimate
description: Nintendo characters battle in the ultimate crossover.
fun_fact: With 89 playable fighters, it has the largest roster of any fighting game!

title: Portal 2
description: Think with portals in this brilliant puzzle-comedy.
fun_fact: The companion cube has its own Twitter account and has become one of gaming's most beloved characters.

title: It Takes Two
description: A couple turned into dolls must work together to save their marriage.
fun_fact: It won Game of the Year 2021 - the first co-op only game ever to win this award!

title: The Jackbox Party Pack 9
description: Party games playable on phones with friends.
fun_fact: Each game in the packs is made by a different team at Jackbox Games.

title: Golf With Your Friends
description: Mini-golf with wacky courses and power-ups.
fun_fact: The game started as a university project before becoming a Steam hit!

title: Gang Beasts
description: Gelatinous characters brawl in absurd environments.
fun_fact: The physics are intentionally terrible to make every fight hilarious.

title: Moving Out
description: Move furniture in increasingly absurd scenarios.
fun_fact: The developers literally moved furniture IRL to understand the physics!

title: Human: Fall Flat
description: Wobbly physics puzzle platforming with friends.
fun_fact: The game has sold over 40 million copies thanks to its streaming popularity.

title: Ultimate Chicken Horse
description: Build levels to challenge your friends while beating them yourself.
fun_fact: Players often create impossible levels just to watch their friends fail.

title: Stick Fight: The Game
description: Stick figures battle with physics-based combat.
fun_fact: Inspired by classic stick figure animations from the early internet.

title: Pummel Party
description: Board game party with brutal mini-games.
fun_fact: The game was designed as a more mature alternative to Mario Party.

title: SpeedRunners
description: Race through obstacle courses as superheroes.
fun_fact: Falling behind means getting eliminated by an ever-shrinking screen.

title: Boomerang Fu
description: Food characters battle with deadly boomerangs.
fun_fact: All characters are cute food items that violently slice each other.

title: Unravel Two
description: Two yarn creatures solve puzzles together.
fun_fact: The yarn physics are based on real textile mathematics!

title: Sackboy: A Big Adventure
description: 3D platforming adventure with the loveable Sackboy.
fun_fact: LittleBigPlanet's Sackboy has appeared in over 10 different games!

title: Kirby and the Forgotten Land
description: Kirby's first 3D platforming adventure.
fun_fact: Kirby can swallow cars and vending machines with his new Mouthful Mode.

title: Yoshi's Crafted World
description: Explore levels made of cardboard and crafts.
fun_fact: Every level is made to look like real crafts with visible tape and cardboard.

title: LEGO Star Wars: The Skywalker Saga
description: All 9 Star Wars movies in LEGO form.
fun_fact: The game contains over 300 playable characters and 23 planets!

title: LEGO Marvel Super Heroes 2
description: Marvel heroes unite in LEGO form to save the multiverse.
fun_fact: Features time-traveling characters from multiple Marvel eras.

title: LEGO DC Super-Villains
description: Play as DC villains in this comedy adventure.
fun_fact: For the first time in LEGO games, you can create your own custom villain.

title: Crash Bandicoot 4
description: Classic Crash platforming with new abilities.
fun_fact: The game ignores Crash games after Warped, making this the true 4th game.

title: Spyro Reignited Trilogy
description: Three classic Spyro games beautifully remastered.
fun_fact: The remaster completely rebuilt all three games from scratch.

title: Crash Team Racing Nitro-Fueled
description: Classic Crash racing rebuilt for modern consoles.
fun_fact: The original CTR was considered by many to be better than Mario Kart!

title: New Super Mario Bros. U Deluxe
description: Classic 2D Mario platforming with friends.
fun_fact: Adds Nabbit and Toadette as easier playable characters.

title: Super Mario 3D World + Bowser's Fury
description: 3D platforming with cat suits and open-world bonus content.
fun_fact: Bowser's Fury was added as a completely new open-world experience.

title: Luigi's Mansion 3
description: Luigi busts ghosts in a haunted hotel.
fun_fact: Each floor of the hotel was designed by a different team at Nintendo.

title: Captain Toad: Treasure Tracker
description: Solve diorama puzzles as the adorable Captain Toad.
fun_fact: Toad can't jump because his backpack is too heavy!

title: Donkey Kong Country: Tropical Freeze
description: Classic DK platforming with incredible music.
fun_fact: The soundtrack was composed by David Wise, who scored the original SNES games.

title: Rayman Legends
description: Beautiful hand-drawn platforming with musical levels.
fun_fact: The musical levels sync gameplay to classic songs reimagined.

title: Cuphead
description: Run-and-gun action in 1930s cartoon style.
fun_fact: Every frame of animation was hand-drawn - over 45,000 frames total!

title: Cuphead: The Delicious Last Course
description: New bosses and Ms. Chalice as a playable character.
fun_fact: The DLC took 5 years to develop due to the painstaking animation process.

title: Shovel Knight: Treasure Trove
description: Retro-style platforming with a shovel-wielding knight.
fun_fact: The game was inspired by classic NES platformers but adds modern quality-of-life features.

title: Hollow Knight
description: Explore a vast underground kingdom of bugs.
fun_fact: Team Cherry (just 3 people) created over 140 unique enemies and made the world entirely interconnected.

title: Ori: The Collection
description: Both Ori games in one beautiful package.
fun_fact: Moon Studios developed both games while being a fully remote team from 40+ countries!

title: Celeste
description: Climb a mountain while facing inner demons.
fun_fact: The game's developer, Maddy Thorson, has said the game is partly autobiographical.

title: Super Meat Boy
description: Precision platforming as a boy made of meat.
fun_fact: The game was made in just 18 months by two people!

title: The Messenger
description: A ninja adventure that transforms halfway through.
fun_fact: The game secretly switches from 8-bit to 16-bit graphics mid-story.

title: Dead Cells
description: Fast-paced roguelike with tight combat.
fun_fact: The game has been updated with new content for over 5 years since launch!

title: Hades
description: Escape the Underworld as the son of Hades.
fun_fact: Voice actors recorded over 20,000 lines of dialogue for incredible variety.

title: Hades II
description: Play as Melinoë fighting to defeat Chronos.
fun_fact: Supergiant Games is one of the few studios where every employee works on every game together.

title: Vampire Survivors
description: Survive waves of monsters with auto-attacking weapons.
fun_fact: Created as a passion project, the game made over $100 million in its first year!

title: Cult of the Lamb
description: Build a cult while dungeon crawling as a cute lamb.
fun_fact: The art style was inspired by Cartoon Network shows from the 2000s.

title: Enter the Gungeon
description: Blast through a dungeon made of guns.
fun_fact: There are over 300 unique guns in the game, including one that shoots bees!

title: The Binding of Isaac: Repentance
description: A dark roguelike with tears as weapons.
fun_fact: The game has had so many updates that it's essentially been remade twice!

title: Risk of Rain 2
description: Survive alien planets with escalating difficulty.
fun_fact: The transition from 2D to 3D only took the developers 8 months to prototype!

title: Spelunky 2
description: Explore deadly caves with procedural generation.
fun_fact: Secrets in the game took the community months to discover and solve.

title: Slay the Spire
description: Build a deck while climbing a spire.
fun_fact: The game invented the 'roguelike deckbuilder' genre, spawning hundreds of similar games!

title: Balatro
description: A poker-based roguelike deck-builder.
fun_fact: The game sold over 1 million copies in its first month, surprising even the developer.

title: Inscryption
description: A card game that breaks the fourth wall.
fun_fact: The game contains secrets that took the community months to uncover, including hidden ARGs.

title: Monster Train
description: Defend a train carrying Hell's last ember.
fun_fact: Combining two clan decks creates unique strategies not possible in single-clan runs.

title: Dicey Dungeons
description: Dice-based dungeon crawling in a game show.
fun_fact: Each of the six characters plays completely differently, essentially being six games in one.

title: One Step From Eden
description: Mega Man Battle Network meets roguelike.
fun_fact: Inspired by the combat system of Mega Man Battle Network games.

title: Into the Breach
description: Tactical mech combat where you see enemy moves.
fun_fact: Made by the creators of FTL, it shows all enemy intentions for pure strategy.

title: FTL: Faster Than Light
description: Command a spaceship fleeing across the galaxy.
fun_fact: The game was funded on Kickstarter for $200,000 and became a massive indie hit.

title: Brotato
description: A potato with guns fights alien hordes.
fun_fact: The game was inspired by the auto-battler genre and Vampire Survivors.

title: Loop Hero
description: Build the world your hero loops through.
fun_fact: The developers intentionally made the game look like a lost NES title.

title: Neon Abyss
description: Run-and-gun roguelike with hatching eggs.
fun_fact: Pet eggs hatch into creatures that evolve as you play.

title: Gunfire Reborn
description: FPS roguelike with animal characters.
fun_fact: Developed by a small Chinese studio that listened extensively to community feedback.

title: Returnal
description: A stranded astronaut dies and loops on an alien planet.
fun_fact: The entire game was inspired by the developer's recurring nightmares.

title: Tetris 99
description: Tetris battle royale against 98 players.
fun_fact: You can target opponents to send garbage blocks and be the last one standing.

title: Puyo Puyo Tetris 2
description: Two classic puzzlers combine in one game.
fun_fact: Mixing Puyo Puyo and Tetris players creates unique asymmetric battles.

title: Dr. Mario
description: Match pills to eliminate viruses.
fun_fact: The original Dr. Mario was designed by Gunpei Yokoi, creator of the Game Boy.

title: WarioWare: Get It Together!
description: Rapid-fire microgames lasting seconds each.
fun_fact: Each character plays the same microgames completely differently.

title: Rhythm Heaven Megamix
description: Eccentric rhythm mini-games.
fun_fact: Features over 100 rhythm games collected from the entire series.

title: Snipperclips
description: Cut each other into shapes to solve puzzles.
fun_fact: The game started as a university project by a solo developer.

title: Death Squared
description: Robots solve deadly puzzles together.
fun_fact: The game is designed to make players accidentally kill each other.

title: Heave Ho
description: Grab hands and swing to safety.
fun_fact: Made by the studio behind TowerFall with similarly chaotic multiplayer.

title: Keep Talking and Nobody Explodes
description: One person defuses a bomb while others read the manual.
fun_fact: The physical bomb manual is available for free, so anyone can be an expert.

title: TowerFall Ascension
description: Archery combat in pixel art arenas.
fun_fact: Made by the creator who later developed Celeste.

title: Lethal Company
description: Scavenge haunted moons for corporate profit.
fun_fact: Made by a single developer in just 6 months, it became a viral sensation!

title: Phasmophobia
description: Hunt ghosts with friends using real equipment.
fun_fact: The ghost AI actually listens to players through their microphones!

title: Content Warning
description: Film spooky content for viral views.
fun_fact: The game's 'Spook Tube' is based on real early 2000s video sharing sites.

title: DEVOUR
description: Stop possessed cultists with your friends.
fun_fact: Each map features a different demon with unique mechanics.

title: Labyrinthine
description: Navigate procedural mazes while avoiding monsters.
fun_fact: The mazes are procedurally generated, so no two runs are the same.

title: PlateUp!
description: Run a restaurant that gets harder each day.
fun_fact: Automating your kitchen with conveyor belts is key to surviving later days.

title: Dave the Diver
description: Dive by day, run a sushi restaurant by night.
fun_fact: The game blends 4 different genres: diving, cooking, farming, and RPG elements!

title: Dredge
description: Fish in an unsettling ocean with dark secrets.
fun_fact: The art style was inspired by old nautical horror stories and H.P. Lovecraft.

title: Subnautica
description: Survive on an alien ocean planet.
fun_fact: The game takes place on planet 4546B, which was procedurally generated but then hand-crafted.

title: Subnautica: Below Zero
description: Explore an arctic alien ocean.
fun_fact: The game features more land-based exploration than the original.

title: Valheim
description: Build and survive in a Viking purgatory.
fun_fact: Made by a team of just 5 people, it sold 10 million copies in its first year!

title: Raft
description: Build a raft and survive the ocean.
fun_fact: Started as a student project and became a Steam best-seller.

title: The Forest
description: Survive on an island inhabited by cannibals.
fun_fact: The game features a day-night cycle that drastically changes gameplay.

title: Sons of the Forest
description: Survive with an AI companion on a cannibal island.
fun_fact: Kelvin, your AI companion, can be given tasks and has become a fan favorite.

title: Green Hell
description: Survive the Amazon rainforest.
fun_fact: The game features medically accurate wound treatment and disease systems.

title: Grounded
description: Survive a backyard after being shrunk.
fun_fact: Obsidian added an arachnophobia mode that makes spiders less scary.

title: No Man's Sky
description: Explore 18 quintillion procedural planets.
fun_fact: The game contains 18 quintillion procedurally generated planets - you could never visit them all.

title: Astroneer
description: Terraform planets with friends.
fun_fact: The terrain deformation system was the game's core innovation.

title: Deep Rock Galactic
description: Dwarven miners blast through procedural caves.
fun_fact: The iconic 'Rock and Stone!' voice line was recorded by the game's actual sound designer.

title: Deep Rock Galactic: Survivor
description: DRG meets Vampire Survivors.
fun_fact: Spinoff that combines the DRG universe with auto-shooter gameplay.

title: Core Keeper
description: Mine an underground world with friends.
fun_fact: The game combines Terraria-style mining with survival crafting elements.

title: Don't Starve Together
description: Survive a dark, whimsical world with friends.
fun_fact: The game was inspired by the developers' love of survival reality shows.

title: Portal Companion Collection
description: Both Portal games on Nintendo Switch.
fun_fact: Perfect portable version of the classic puzzle games.

title: Pikmin 4
description: Command tiny plant creatures to solve puzzles.
fun_fact: Features a dog companion named Oatchi who can carry Pikmin and fight enemies.

title: Sea of Thieves
description: Sail the seas as pirates with friends.
fun_fact: The game has no progression gates - day one players can access everything.

title: Sea of Stars
description: A love letter to classic JRPGs.
fun_fact: The pixel art team animated every single frame by hand - over 25,000 frames total.

title: Eastward
description: A miner and a mysterious girl travel east.
fun_fact: The game took 8 years to develop by a small Shanghai studio.

title: CrossCode
description: An action RPG set in an MMORPG.
fun_fact: The protagonist can't speak due to a glitch, adding unique storytelling.

title: Chained Echoes
description: A 16-bit style JRPG with mechs.
fun_fact: Made almost entirely by one developer over 7 years.

title: Octopath Traveler II
description: Eight travelers with intertwining stories.
fun_fact: The HD-2D art style combines 2D sprites with 3D environments and lighting.

title: Live A Live
description: Seven different stories across time periods.
fun_fact: Originally a 1994 Super Famicom game that never left Japan until this remake.

title: Triangle Strategy
description: Tactical RPG with branching decisions.
fun_fact: Your party members vote on key decisions, forcing moral compromises.

title: Fire Emblem Engage
description: Tactical RPG with heroes from FE history.
fun_fact: The game features characters from every previous Fire Emblem game as summonable 'Emblems'.

title: Mario + Rabbids Sparks of Hope
description: Mario and Rabbids in tactical battles.
fun_fact: Removed the grid system from the first game for more fluid movement.

title: Wargroove 2
description: Advance Wars-style tactics with online play.
fun_fact: Includes a full level editor for creating and sharing custom campaigns.

title: Advance Wars 1+2: Re-Boot Camp
description: Classic GBA tactics games remastered.
fun_fact: The remake was delayed a year due to the real-world invasion of Ukraine.

title: Tactics Ogre: Reborn
description: A classic tactical RPG remastered.
fun_fact: The original director also created Final Fantasy Tactics.

title: Symphony of War
description: Squad-based tactical RPG.
fun_fact: Allows you to customize unit classes with incredible depth.

title: Wildermyth
description: Procedural storytelling tactical RPG.
fun_fact: Your heroes age across campaigns and their stories continue for generations.

title: Marvel Snap
description: Fast Marvel card battles.
fun_fact: Ben Brode, the designer, previously created Hearthstone at Blizzard!

title: Legends of Runeterra
description: Card game in the League of Legends universe.
fun_fact: The game uses characters from League of Legends' 14-year history.

title: Gwent: The Witcher Card Game
description: The Witcher 3's card game standalone.
fun_fact: The card game from The Witcher 3 was so popular it became its own game!

title: Magic: The Gathering Arena
description: Digital Magic: The Gathering.
fun_fact: Magic: The Gathering has over 25,000 unique cards created since 1993!

title: Pokemon TCG Live
description: Official digital Pokemon card game.
fun_fact: Physical Pokemon card packs include codes for digital packs.

title: Yu-Gi-Oh! Master Duel
description: The definitive Yu-Gi-Oh digital game.
fun_fact: Features every card ever printed in the real game's history.

title: Hearthstone
description: Blizzard's accessible card game.
fun_fact: Originally titled 'Hearthstone: Heroes of Warcraft' and set in the Warcraft universe.

title: Backpack Hero
description: Arrange your backpack to fight monsters.
fun_fact: The entire combat system is based on inventory Tetris.

title: NBA 2K24
description: The premier basketball simulation.
fun_fact: The motion capture for players uses over 50 cameras to capture every movement.

title: EA Sports FC 25
description: The new era of football games.
fun_fact: This is the first FIFA-style game without the FIFA name after EA and FIFA split!

title: MLB The Show 24
description: The definitive baseball experience.
fun_fact: The game tracks real-world stats daily to update player ratings!

title: Madden NFL 25
description: American football simulation.
fun_fact: Named after legendary coach and commentator John Madden.

title: WWE 2K24
description: WWE wrestling entertainment.
fun_fact: Features wrestlers from 40 years of WrestleMania history.

title: PGA Tour 2K24
description: Professional golf simulation.
fun_fact: Real PGA courses are recreated using laser-scanned topographical data.

title: Riders Republic
description: Extreme sports in US national parks.
fun_fact: The open world contains real locations from 7 different US national parks.

title: Steep
description: Open-world winter sports.
fun_fact: The Alps are recreated using satellite data for accuracy.

title: Tony Hawk's Pro Skater 1+2
description: Classic skating games remastered.
fun_fact: The remaster uses many of the same developers from the original 1999 game!

title: Skate 3
description: Skateboarding simulation.
fun_fact: The 'flick-it' control system revolutionized skateboarding game controls.

title: OlliOlli World
description: 2D skating with personality.
fun_fact: The art style is inspired by adventure time and aims for pure joy.

title: Hot Wheels Unleashed 2
description: Race iconic Hot Wheels cars.
fun_fact: Real Hot Wheels designers helped create exclusive cars for the game.

title: Forza Horizon 5
description: Open-world racing in Mexico.
fun_fact: The map is based on a real section of Mexico, recreated with satellite data.

title: Gran Turismo 7
description: The real driving simulator.
fun_fact: Professional race car drivers use the game for training and practice!

title: Need for Speed Unbound
description: Street racing with unique art style.
fun_fact: Mixes realistic cars with anime-inspired visual effects.
